timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Rex waits in a law firm's office; the receptionist informs him that Mr. Massey will see him shortly.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Spouse locking out husband and refusing discussion
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Marilyn locks Rex out of the house, tells him to leave via intercom, and threatens to set dogs on him when he refuses to go.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To prevent Rex from entering the home and end communication about reconciliation.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Rex is excluded from the home and proceeds to a law firm for legal advice.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Divorce and financial implications related to Rex's business.
evidence_quotes: MARYLIN Rex. Get away from the door.
MARYLIN We are. And it's winding down.
MARYLIN Rex. Go away. I don't want to have to sic the dogs on you.

relation_updates: Marriage is adversarial
Rex is excluded from home
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Controlling and threatening spouse who enforces physical separation.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 3、EXT. RUNNING PATH - SAN VICENTE BLVD. - MORNING
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Ruth and Miles clash over asset demands; Rex wavers due to Ruth's past care but is persuaded by Miles to stay firm, despite Marilyn's medical distraction and emotional tensions.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Discussing divorce strategy with friends while power walking
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Marilyn confirms hiring lawyer Ruth Rabino and references her private investigator's plan to win the case.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To win the divorce case against Rex
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Shared legal strategy and team details with friends
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Outcome of the divorce proceedings
evidence_quotes: MARYLIN Ruth Rabino.
MARYLIN In the words of my Private Investigator, we're going to nail his ass.

relation_updates: Friends aware of divorce plans
Knows Rex has Miles Massey as lawyer
status_updates: Has private investigator working on case
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Determined to handle divorce decisively, avoiding new relationships until it is settled

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Patricia recalls Marylin, formerly Patty, as a child who aspired to be divorced from a rich man, a dream she sees as coming true, sharing the memory fondly despite its oddity.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Witness on stand in divorce trial, cross-examined by Miles, and surprised by mother's testimony.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Marilyn testifies about her devastation, is cross-examined by Miles on her personal feelings, and then her mother Patricia is called as a surprise witness, revealing their hidden relationship.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: On witness stand, family background exposed, and surprised by mother's appearance in court.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: How will Patricia's testimony affect the divorce case?
evidence_quotes: Marylin Rexroth now struggles to maintain her composure on the witness stand.
MARYLIN I was devastated.
Marylin, in the process of reseating herself behind her table, pauses.
MARYLIN Jesus.

relation_updates: Adversarial dynamic with Miles Massey intensifies in courtroom
Mother-daughter relationship with Patricia Banderas revealed unexpectedly
status_updates: Now a witness in the trial
Family background being exposed in court
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Struggles to maintain composure under cross-examination and family revelation.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Marylin receives congratulations; Miles questions her about Howard's gesture, implying doubt about their future, while exchanging tense, veiled remarks about the marriage's durability and potential downfall.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Bride
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Says 'I do' during wedding ceremony with Howard D. Doyle.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To marry Howard D. Doyle
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Pronounced married to Howard D. Doyle by Rabbi Bolensky.
evidence_quotes: MARYLIN I do.
A kiss.

relation_updates: Married to Howard D. Doyle
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Bride in a simple, Kennedy-type gown.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Miles insists on contacting Marylin Rexroth Doyle, claiming she owes him a meal, despite Wrigley's warning; her wealth and prowess are likened to a top athlete's.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Divorcee (reported)
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Reportedly divorced from Howard and now very wealthy.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Divorced and wealthy
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Miles' impending call
evidence_quotes: Marylin Rexroth is divorced!
she's richer than Croesus.
She owes me a meal.

relation_updates: Miles decides to contact her because she owes him a meal
auxiliary.persona_anchor: An athlete at the peak of her power

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Miles receives a distressed, possibly drunk call from Marylin, who expresses self-loathing and is driving erratically on Sunset near Beverly Hills; he urgently directs her to come to his place.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Marilyn calls Miles in distress while driving drunk
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Marilyn expresses self-loathing to Miles and he directs her to come to his place for safety
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To have Miles provide immediate safety by coming to his location
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Marilyn agrees to drive to Miles's place without stopping
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The cause of Marilyn's emotional distress remains unaddressed
evidence_quotes: MARYLIN You're right about me. I am worthless. I am nothing. I don't deserve to live.
MARYLIN I don't blame them for betraying me. I don't blame Rex, or Howard or my father.
MILES No. Don't stop.
MARYLIN Okay Miles.

relation_updates: Turns to Miles in crisis, establishing new trust

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Marylin insists on a marriage rooted in love and trust, embracing vulnerability despite warnings, and rejects the pre-nup to uphold shared property and emotional openness with Miles.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Bride rejecting a prenuptial agreement to base her marriage on trust and shared property
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Marilyn refuses to sign the prenup and states her desire for a marriage founded on love, trust, and community property, embracing vulnerability.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To marry without legal safeguards, with full emotional and financial openness
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: About to marry under terms of mutual trust and shared assets, with no prenuptial agreement
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Potential vulnerability to exploitation due to lack of legal protection
evidence_quotes: Miles. I don't want to sign this. I want this marriage to be different.
I want to be exposed.

relation_updates: Marilyn and Miles enter marriage with shared property and no prenuptial agreement
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Affectionate and resolute bride who prioritizes trust over security

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Emily confronts Miles, revealing Howard Doyle tricked him into marrying Marylin as revenge for past wrongs against her and Marylin Rexroth, with a nurse intervening.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Accused of being a phony wife in Howard Doyle's revenge scheme
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Emily reveals to Miles that Howard Doyle tricked him into marrying Marilyn with a fake pre-nup as revenge.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Miles is informed that his marriage to Marilyn may be fraudulent
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Marilyn knowingly participated in the deception and her motives
evidence_quotes: He tricked you. With a phony wife and a fake pre-nup.
You married Marylin, didn't you? You thought she had money.

relation_updates: Accused of conspiring with Howard Doyle against Miles

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Herb angrily tells Miles to act like a man, emphasizing their role in serving and honoring the law, but asserts that obeying it is not required in their current situation.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Confronting Miles with an IRS threat and deal proposal
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Marilyn threatens to report Miles's unreported income from gifts like art and watches to the IRS, and offers to drop the threat if he forgives the forgery charges.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To get Miles to drop the forgery charges
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Marilyn has left the house after proposing the deal
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Miles will accept the deal to drop charges
evidence_quotes: I'm reporting you to the IRS.
Unreported income.
Drop the bogus forgery charge and I'll forget about your generous friends slash clients.

relation_updates: Marilyn confronts Miles aggressively
Proposes deal to exchange silence for dropped charges
status_updates: Taking offensive legal action against Miles

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Miles and Marylin, after a tense meeting with lawyers and mutual accusations, reach a turning point when Miles signs the pre-nup; Marylin tears it, and they share a kiss, choosing reconciliation over separation.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Marilyn and Miles reconcile in a lawyer's conference room after accusing each other of hiring hitmen.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Marilyn tears up the pre-nup document after Miles signs it, and they kiss, ending their conflict.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Reconcile with Miles and avoid divorce.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Marilyn and Miles leave the conference room together to go home.
evidence_quotes: Marylin rips the paper in half.
They kiss.
MILES Let's go home.

relation_updates: Miles Massey: reconciled, choosing marriage
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Decisive and reconciliatory, choosing emotional connection over legal formalities.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Miles gives away pre-Castro Cohiba cigars to a construction worker after his pregnant wife expresses concern for his safety, reflecting on legacy and love.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Pregnant wife urging husband to discard cigars for safety
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Marilyn's concern for Miles's safety prompts him to give away his pre-Castro cigars.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Marilyn is visibly pregnant with son Gus, and Miles has discarded the cigars in response to her concern.
evidence_quotes: ON MARYLIN Mightily pregnant.
MARYLIN You know, sweets, he's right.
What if something happened to you? What would I tell little Gus when he asked \"what was my daddy like?\"
MARYLIN Sweet.

relation_updates: Miles prioritizes her concern over personal indulgences
Marital bond strengthened through shared family focus

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Marilyn initiates a divorce from Rex Rexroth, hires lawyer Ruth Rabino, and testifies in court against opposing counsel Miles Massey. She marries Howard D. Doyle, divorces him wealthy, then develops a vulnerable relationship with Miles, marrying him without a prenup. After their marriage is exposed as a revenge plot and they face legal conflicts, they reconcile and Marilyn becomes pregnant with Miles's child.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Miles challenges Rex's expectation of discarding his wife despite his infidelity, highlighting the injustice as Rex naively seeks a favorable divorce outcome.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Senior divorce attorney at Massey Myerson firm
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Miles delivers a speech rejecting compromise in marriage dissolution and consults with Rex Rexroth, taking on his divorce case.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To represent Rex Rexroth using an aggressive, opponent-destroying approach as per his firm's philosophy.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Miles has accepted Rex as a client, knowing about the video evidence of infidelity and the absence of a prenuptial agreement.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Rex's lack of a prenuptial agreement and the video evidence against him in the divorce.
evidence_quotes: But at Massey Myerson we believe life is struggle and the ultimate destruction of your opponent.

is there a pre-nup? Rex hangs his head.

relation_updates: Becomes legal representative for Rex Rexroth
status_updates: Established as senior partner at Massey Myerson firm
auxiliary.persona_anchor: A senior divorce lawyer who promotes destroying opponents rather than compromising in legal disputes.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Patricia recalls Marylin, formerly Patty, as a child who aspired to be divorced from a rich man, a dream she sees as coming true, sharing the memory fondly despite its oddity.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Attorney cross-examining Marilyn Rexroth in court
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Quotes poetry during cross-examination to question Marilyn's sincerity and surprises the court by calling her mother as a witness.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Marylin receives congratulations; Miles questions her about Howard's gesture, implying doubt about their future, while exchanging tense, veiled remarks about the marriage's durability and potential downfall.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Miles urges associates to choose love and trust over cynicism in client relationships, declaring his commitment to love, while Herb Myserson observes silently in the back.

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Miles Massey starts as a ruthless divorce lawyer who takes on Rex Rexroth's case and becomes attracted to Marilyn Rexroth, manipulating the legal system against her. He later pursues Marilyn romantically after her divorce, leading to marriage and a public shift towards love, but upon discovering a revenge plot, he descends into criminal conspiracy by arranging her murder. He reverses course to save her, reconciles, and embraces family life.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.resulting_state: In pain, with performers halting their dance to watch and one expressing concern.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Nature and severity of Rex's sudden arm pain
evidence_quotes: Rex hunches over, clutching his left arm.
One by one, the girls stop dancing and stare.
TART -- Whatsa matter, Rexie?

relation_updates: Performers express concern for Rex's well-being
status_updates: Suffers acute pain in left arm

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Rex Rexroth begins locked out of his home and facing divorce from Marylin. He hires lawyer Miles Massey, revealing infidelity and financial vulnerabilities, then navigates negotiations and court proceedings under Miles's guidance. After Marylin vows revenge, Rex experiences a sudden health crisis at a party.
